programme.sub-title: S19 : E10 No Wanna Stop
programme.desc: A high speed chase comes to a halt in a residential area and the driver is taken in for sobriety testing. A suspicious vehicle takes off as an officer approaches and a high speed chase ensues. An officer pulls over a vehicle belonging to a battery suspect who attempts to eat evidence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E20 A Mother's Love
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E07 The Fighting Kind
programme.desc: An officer wrestles a squirrely meth user who thinks he’s the Incredible Hulk. Cops catch a drug-carrying sprinter when he runs out of gas. A belligerent suspect doesn’t take kindly to having his socks removed.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E35 Down-home Dog
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation. An elderly man is questioned after reportedly kicking a juvenile in the face. A man is shot in the head by his roommate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E21 Beer Run
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E11 Taser Proof
programme.desc: Officers learn the hard way that even a taser can’t take some suspects down. Patrol cars roll up on a couple in a darkened pickup truck. Cops arrest one of the most polite suspects in America.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E05 Call the Manager
programme.desc: An angry customer threatens a store employee with a rock. Officers suspect the ‘medicine’ found in a suspect’s car is actually his business product. A stepfather gets into a fist fight.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E11 Pay the Price
programme.desc: Officers make an arrest in connection to an armed robbery with the help of the K-9 unit. Officers respond to a disturbance call at a local restaurant involving the manager and an inebriated patron. An officer pulls over a vehicle which later turns out to be littered with drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E22 Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a small bag of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E06 Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E08 An Unfortunate Cycle
programme.desc: Officers arrange a sting to capture bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer stops a vehicle after witnessing a prostitute get inside.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E14 Not Gonna Stop
programme.desc: Despite driving a large SUV and trailer, a suspect tries to outrun the police. A driver tries to hide contraband on his person. Police are called into a domestic dispute involving a husband and wife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E15 Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother’s house. A drunk driver won’t admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E36 Last Call Brawl
programme.desc: Deputies chase a man who flees a routine traffic stop. Deputies find drugs on a man who gives them an expired license. Officers respond to a man attacking several patrons in a bar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E19 You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A husky cyclist takes a spill when he tries to flee. Officers chase a suspect in a stolen car who says he was just fixing it for a friend. A man's denials of drug use lose credibility when cops find a meth pipe in his vehicle

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E09 Crazy as a Loon
programme.desc: Officers conduct a traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. Officers conduct a drug-reversal-buy sting to capture buyers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E13 Shots Fired
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E06 Sharp Knives and Dirty Donuts
programme.desc: A customer pulls out a knife when asked to leave the store. A man doing donuts in a motel parking lot is questioned about a love triangle. Officers are flagged down by a man who was shot at while riding his bike.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E35 Domestic Headbanger
programme.desc: A vehicular pursuit in Florida comes to a head when the driver careens into a ditch. An officer responds to a troubling domestic call. An intoxicated brawler is taken into custody.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E29 What’s in the Box?
programme.desc: A homeless man puts up a serious fight to maintain his freedom. A suspicious man and woman in a parked car catch an officer’s attention. A lovers’ squabble draws attention to an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E03 Take out Orders
programme.desc: Officers investigate a fiasco at a fast food restaurant. A routine pullover results in a drug possession arrest. A vehicular pursuit results in an ill fated foot chase, the suspect is taken to jail for an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E17 Traffic Stop Interrupted
programme.desc: Officers respond to an assault call which escalates to car chase and the eventual arrest of two suspects. Officers spot a known drug dealer who uses a troubling method to conceal his narcotics. An officer curbs a heckler outside a popular bar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E15 Jumping to Conclusions
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have defiantly barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E28 To the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner is held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E03 Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no ID bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E29 Crash Landing
programme.desc: Hiding in an attic doesn’t work out so well for a man who comes crashing through a ceiling. Cops stop a man with a broken car and a broken heart. Neighbors call the police when non-stop cussin’ interrupts their night.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E25 Shaking Like a Paint Mixer
programme.desc: A man jumps from a moving vehicle in an effort to escape the police. A car chase ends with a call to paramedics. An agitated man confuses threatening actions with heroism.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E12 Above the Law
programme.desc: A foot chase gets complicated when the suspect proves he’s not in good health. A suspect believes he doesn’t need to follow the rules of the road. A man calls the police on his ex-girlfriend when she makes a moving mistake.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E29 Hard Ticket
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot-chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for back-up after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E11 Crack Heaven
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E33 Dare I Ask?
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E33 Skipping Rocks
programme.desc: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E30 Follow the Tire Tracks
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress at a tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E10 Running in Traffic
programme.desc: A fleeing suspect takes officers on a wild chase through oncoming traffic. Surveillance footage of a stabbing helps police find the vicious attacker. Cops track a subject into an uncooperative stranger’s apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E23 Donut Pursuit
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck after a donut shop robbery. Deputies are dispatched when a wife attacks her husband with an unknown object. Deputies respond to a mother and son knife fight.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E01 Batter Up
programme.desc: After a tow service employee denies a woman her car back, she uses his body for batting practice. A man with a warrant explains his medicinal meth use. No lie is too big for a couple trying to convince officers they didn’t shoplift.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E05 Dyed in the Wool
programme.desc: A suspect selling narcotics takes off on foot. A bank robber leaves his wallet in an abandoned money bag. Multiple domestic violence calls end in arrests

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E29 Who Wet the Dogs Out
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E04 That’s not Chapstick
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E25 Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed “Danger” is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E06 Kill ‘Em With Kindness
programme.desc: A belligerent gun-toting man doesn't take too well to some harsh parental criticism. A bike rider tries to outpace a policeman then pretends to be someone else. Officers try to coax a rattled hit-and-run driver into coming clean.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E07 Chainsaw Man
programme.desc: Detectives find a loaded gun while searching a vehicle. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E30 It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son’s girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E25 Fangs Come Out
programme.desc: A woman bites the arresting officer and store manager after trying to steal beer. A passenger of a suspicious vehicle attempts to hide drugs. Police respond to a call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E18 An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck is stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E17 The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: A man with many warrants puts up a fight when faced with jail. A desperate driver makes a last-minute attempt to hide his crime. A teenager must join the workforce after he makes a costly error.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E20 Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E16 Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: An entitled young man thinks that he can command the police. A known lawbreaker eludes deputies long enough to cause serious damage. Emotions run high when a mother confronts her handcuffed son.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E16 Familiar Faces
programme.desc: A group of suspects race a stolen SUV through a residential neighborhood. A drunk man has a kitchen knife and a listening problem. Two usual suspects are going back to jail for their latest escapades.

programme.title: Construction Squad
programme.desc: Zespół budowlany buduje Samochodzikowo cegła po cegle! Pokazują, że wszystko jest możliwe z pomocą naszych przyjaciół.

programme.title: Learning with AnimaCars
programme.desc: Odkryjmy liczby, litery, kolory i kształty poprzez zabawne i ekscytujące zadania na świeżym powietrzu z załogą AnimaCars!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Poznaj Monster Trucks, ciężko pracujące samochody, które łączą siły, aby pomóc przyjaciołom i mieszkańcom Monster City.

programme.title: Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl Super Truck i jego gadżety na ratunek! Gdy mieszkańcy Car City potrzebują pomocy, ten superbohater wkracza do akcji.

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Wszyscy na pokład ekspresu edukacyjnego! Ted to pociąg, który uczy dzieci o kolorach, zwierzętach, owocach, warzywach i nie tylko.

programme.title: Tom the Tow Truck
programme.desc: Poznaj Toma, wynalazcę z Samochodzikowa! W swoim nowoczesnym laboratorium tworzy wynalazki, aby rozwiązać problemy przyjaciół.

programme.title: Tom's Paint Shop

programme.desc: Poznaj Jonny'ego Toolboxa i AnimaCars i dołącz do ich licznych misji ratunkowych, aby przywrócić spokój w Animatown!

programme.title: Pinkfong Halloween Dance Party
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong Halloween Dance Party
programme.desc: It’s Halloween time again! Join the fun and dance along with adorable little monsters!

programme.title: Baby Shark Stole My Heart Again!
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 Baby Shark Stole My Heart Again!
programme.desc: Baby Shark, the sparkling superstar of the universe! Thanks for loving us for 10 years—are you ready for even more songs and dances?

programme.title: Baby Shark Dinosaur Play
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Baby Shark transforms into a dinosaur! Triceratops! Tyrannosaurus! Roar! The scary Tyrannosaurus Shark is chasing us! Run away, friends~!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 Bebefinn 4 Ep10
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Baby Shark the Dentist
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Oh no, it looks like you have a tooth injury, so you've come to the dentist! Dr. Baby Shark will take care of everything for you! Alright, let's start the treatment. Please open wide and say "Ahh"!

programme.title: Learn Colors with Dinosaurs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Learn Colors with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Look what we found! Our friends have discovered mysterious, colorful dinosaur eggs! Place them in the magic incubator and watch them change colors. What kind of mighty dinosaurs will hatch from these rainbow eggs? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Catch the Thief Shark Family
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Catch the Thief Shark Family!
programme.desc: Code Red! Code Red! The Thief Shark family has escaped from jail! Join Police Baby Shark on a thrilling chase to catch the naughty sharks hiding all over town. Suit up, Officer! It’s time for an arrest!

programme.title: Baby Shark Special Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Doo doo doo doo doo doo! For all fans who love our Baby Shark songs, here we are with baby shark songs compilation. Everybody, Let's go and have some fun.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Episode 6
programme.desc: Learn colors with Hogi and Wonderville Friends!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong Ninimo Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Learn Nursery Rhymes with Pinkfong's new friend Ninimo

programme.title: Boo and Mandoo
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Boo and Mandoo
programme.desc: Meet Boo the cat and Mandoo the puppy! They’re always bickering—but can they become friends? Maybe a game of ball will bring them closer!

programme.title: Hogi's Hospital Play
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Hogi's Hospital Play
programme.desc: Wonder Star friends are sick! Join Hogi and Forest as they become doctors and heal their friends!

programme.title: Baby Shark Hospital Play Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Baby Shark Hospital Play Song
programme.desc: Ta-da! Baby Shark Hospital Play is now open! Doctor Baby Shark is here to fix any boo-boo. Let's wash away the germs and get healthy with the catchy tunes of 'Baby Shark’s Hospital Play'! Next patient, please!

programme.title: Dance Adventure
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Arrr-! Are you ready for a fun adventure? Come and let's sing and dance together! Arrr-!

programme.title: Kikipuppup
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Meow Meow, Woof Woof! Bickering Again Today! Meet the cute rivals, Kiki & Puppo— and… Vex! A fun story about a cute cat and dog, sharing little laughs, heartwarming moments, and tiny bits of growing up every day!

programme.title: We Are Baby Doctors!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 We Are Baby Doctors!
programme.desc: Cough, cough! Sniffle, sniffle! Help me, Doctor! I don’t feel well. Bebefinn and Minjee are having a 'Hospital Play' day! Don’t worry—Doctor Bebefinn and Minjee will make you feel all better with a magic touch. Let’s play doctor!

programme.title: Five Little Animals Dancing on the Farm
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Five Little Animals Dancing on the Farm
programme.desc: Join the Bebefinn family and meet five friendly farm animals! From cows and ducks to sheep, pigs, and bunnies—it’s time to wiggle, shake, and dance along! Are you ready to move like an animal?

programme.title: Making Pizza with Bebefinn!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Making Pizza with Bebefinn!
programme.desc: Pineapple pizza or chocolate pizza? It’s time for the Bebefinn family’s special pizza-making adventure! What do you think it will taste like? Let’s use our imagination!

programme.title: Catch the Thief Shark Family
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Catch the Thief Shark Family!
programme.desc: Code Red! Code Red! The Thief Shark family has escaped from jail! Join Police Baby Shark on a thrilling chase to catch the naughty sharks hiding all over town. Suit up, Officer! It’s time for an arrest!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Pinkfong & Hogi: New Friend Ninimo
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: One day, Pinkfong’s magical powers and memories of home planet Staria slowly start to disappear, and a mysterious cat named Ninimo appears! But even without the magical powers and memories, Pinkfong discovers the magic of friendship in Wonderville.

programme.title: Ninimo is Sick

programme.desc: Ninimo has caught a cold! Become a doctor with Hogi and Forest to treat sick Ninimo!

programme.desc: What’s the weather like today? Sunny, rainy, windy, or snowy—there are so many kinds of weather to explore! Let’s learn all about weather with Bebefinn!

programme.title: The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Shark Family's Teeth Hurt!
programme.desc: Oh no! Mommy Shark has cavities, Daddy Shark has a broken tooth, and Big Brother Shark’s teeth have turned yellow! Doctor Baby Shark and friends are here to help make them healthy again!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family.

programme.title: Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Happy New Year, Bebefinn
programme.desc: The Bebefinn family looks back on the year while flipping through their photo album. What fun things happened to the Bebefinn family this year? It was a happy year because everyone was together. Let’s fill the new year with even more sweet and happy moments with the Bebefinn family!

programme.title: We are Construction Vehicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 We are Construction Vehicles
programme.desc: Oh no, the bridge has collapsed! Let’s head to the construction site with Hoi and his team of construction vehicles!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.desc: I love you, I love you, I love you! Let’s share Baby Shark’s love for family! Sing along and count from one to ten together!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2

programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Episode 7
programme.desc: Jenni likes things that sparkle. But oops! Because Jenni shoved all these knick-knacks back in the closet, the door won't open again! Wonderstar persuades Jenni to decorate the threes outside with the sparkly stuff instead. Where did all my tools go?! The great inventor Poki's tools are keep disappearing. What! the screwdriver is gone! Oh well, my wrench just went missing too...

programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Episode 8
programme.desc: Quick delivery! Jordi's ice cream cart got stuck in mud. Help Jordi get the cheese ice cream in time before it melts. Let's go Wonderstars! Rachel sings Wonderville's super popular song 'Yum Yum Pie' and the friends shout for the encore! But nobody wants to hear the songs that Rachel wrote. Wonderstar suggests a concert with Rachel's amazing songs! Will they succeed?

programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Episode 9
programme.desc: Chumli got coverd in sticky acorn nut butter! Help me, Wonderstar! I have to wash it off before my body turns into a statue! Here's the mission! Find the missing bananas! The bananas that are supposed to be in Codi's cart are all gone. What happened? Codi finds Wonderstar for help.

programme.title: We Are Baby Doctors!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 We Are Baby Doctors!

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Metal That Rocks
programme.desc: Where rock 'n' roll swagger meets the weight of metal. This collection bridges the gap, featuring everything from anthemic hard rock to core-shaking classics. It’s loud, it’s proud, and it’s built to move you.

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Bay Area Godfathers II
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: From The Scene For The Scene
programme.desc: Go beyond the music and into the heart of the underground. This collection pairs heavy-hitting videos with exclusive band interviews and reports from metal capitals worldwide. Built by the scene, for the scene.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Okra and Oats
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Robert Jewell explores recipes using two very different ingredients that start with the letter "O," oats and okra. For his first dish, Robert uses okra in a classic cornmeal cake recipe, but bumps up the flavour factor with spicy jalapenos. Robert balances the heat of the jalapeno with a tart green tomato and crunchy red onion salsa. In his next recipe, Robert keeps the heat, but switches up his recipes for a curry-spiced oat pancake. This Indian inspired dish needs something to cool it down and Robert knows exactly what that is - sweet, silky applesauce! He's up for the challenge when it comes to combining okra and oats into one dish, and the results are tasty!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Super Tonics
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Super Tonics by Meredith Youngson! Follow along as Shahir prepares healthy, delicious beverages and foods including brownie batter chia pudding, a blue lavender latte, chai cinnamon roll baked oatmeal, and much more!

programme.title: Cook The Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 My Thali
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Super Tonics by Meredith Youngson! Follow along as Shahir prepares healthy, delicious beverages and foods including brownie batter chia pudding, a blue lavender latte, chai cinnamon roll baked oatmeal, and much more!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 High Protein
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a protein packed meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: quinoa and edamame salad, mini meatloaves, and oatmeal chocolate chip protein bites!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Free Of
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an allergen friendly meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: kale and lentil salad with green goddess dressing, chickpea curry, and avocado key lime pie cups!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Breakfast for Dinner
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make breakfast for dinner for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: a veggie frittata, sweet and peppery bacon, a cottage cheese pancake stack, and fruit skewers!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E06 Chicken Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Chef-host Natalia Machado loves chicken, and who doesn't? Chicken is enjoyed around the world for good reason; it is versatile and reliably delicious!

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Fruit
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular fruit recipes, from hosts like Spencer Watts and Kimberly Lallouz.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Snacks
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular snack recipes, from hosts like Kyle Crawford and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Land, Sea & Air
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik put their heads together to design a three-course menu, where each course must be based around either land, sea, or air! You have to “sea” it to believe it!

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Scallops & Pork
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the more tantalizing dish! The catch? Each of their plates must prominently feature both scallops and pork tenderloin!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 High Protein
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a protein packed meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: quinoa and edamame salad, mini meatloaves, and oatmeal chocolate chip protein bites!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Free Of
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an allergen friendly meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: kale and lentil salad with green goddess dressing, chickpea curry, and avocado key lime pie cups!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Breakfast for Dinner
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make breakfast for dinner for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: a veggie frittata, sweet and peppery bacon, a cottage cheese pancake stack, and fruit skewers!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 DIY Weddings
programme.desc: Warm host Jessica McGovern offers up some do-it-yourself recipes that will spice up any wedding.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Around the World
programme.desc: Talented baker Jessica McGovern takes us around the world with diverse desserts from countries like Japan and Germany.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Picnic
programme.desc: Picnics are fun, elegant, and filled with delicious food! Host Jessica McGovern shows us some of her favourite picnic-ready desserts.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Avocados and Apricots
programme.desc: "A" is on the menu and Chef Robert Jewell takes on this meal challenge with apricots and avocados. First up, Robert cooks a spicy roasted quail and drizzles it with some sweet apricot and calvados sauce. Next, is a meal best served cold! Robert slices up sushi-grade tuna and transforms it into a flavourful tartare, brought to life by rich avocado and refreshing lime. On the side, he adds crusty crostini with savoury soy sauce and sesame oil, the perfect complement for this meltin- your-mouth meal. For his final dish, Robert combines apricots and avocados for an unbelievably tasty dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Dill and Duck
programme.desc: Host Theresa Visintin picks the letter “D” in this challenge and combines two very different ingredients – dill and duck! But that’s no big dill for Theresa. For her first dish, Theresa uses dill seeds and weed to make a hearty, creamy dill pickle soup. She adds chicken broth and potatoes as her base but makes the soup extra smooth with some sour cream. She tops the soup with dill pickles to add a delightful crunch. Next, Theresa takes duck, a classic French ingredient, and gives it a French Canadian twist – duck tourtière. Using the duck fat to fry up some veggies, she adds red wine to her chicken stock and simmers the meat. Then, Theresa fills a pie crust with this delightful duck filling and coats the crust with egg wash before baking it to a golden brown. Finally, Theresa takes on both ingredients to create a delectable dill and duck dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E17 Endive and Eggplant
programme.desc: Showcasing the unique flavours of endive and eggplant, Chef Lauren Gulyas receives the letter "E" for her cooking challenge. She sets sail by creating an endive salad boat, the perfect delivery vessel for her smoked trout with creÌ€me fraiche, and goat cheese with walnut appetizers. She follows up with a stuffed baby eggplant, Moroccan style! Chef Lauren sauteÌs onion and garlic with some smoky sweet paprika and a snip of savoury sage, the aromatic combination lends itself beautifully to the succulent flavour of lamb. For her grand finale, Chef Lauren prepares the pieÌ€ce de reÌsistance using both endive and eggplant.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Shrimp and Sausage
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Seeds
programme.desc: Chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts is all about the often forgotten seeds as he shows how much flavor they can add to sole and squid.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Peppers
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts spices things up in the kitchen as he makes peppERS-inspired dishes with catfish and clams.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Sweet
programme.desc: Satisfy your craving for something sweet with these delicious sablefish and lobster dishes from chef and seafood lover Spencer Watts.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Fast Favs
programme.desc: For a quick and tasty meal, chef Spencer Watts cooks up fast favs using scallops and trout, all done in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 Mushrooms Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Mushrooms grow by the light of the moon; in this episode, our accomplished chef-host Katie Ardington expertly exposes them to the light of day"...

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Desserts that Sizzle
programme.desc: Sweet classics meet modern flair as the griddle transforms sugar, butter, and batter into sizzling masterpieces. Explore dessert history while crafting fresh creations that bubble, melt, and delight.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Philly Frenzy
programme.desc: A symbol of comfort and city pride, the Philly cheesesteak continues to inspire fresh imagination. Thin-sliced steak, melting cheese, and griddled bread set the foundation as new flavors and regional twists bring this iconic sandwich into a new era of creativity.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Tailgate Feast: Gameday Grub
programme.desc: Game day traditions meet sizzling creativity as familiar favorites hit the griddle. From sliders to smoky wings, these dishes celebrate casual gatherings and the inventive ways home chefs turn everyday ingredients into shareable, crowd-pleasing bites.

programme.desc: Game day traditions meet sizzling creativity as familiar favorites hit the griddle. From sliders to smoky wings, these dishes celebrate casual gatherings and the inventive ways home chefs turn everyday ingredients into shareable, crowd-pleasing bites.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 Salmon Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Salmon is one of the few fish worthy of its own Cook Like a Chef episode; join Chef Natalia Machado as she introduces us to its many virtues…

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Super Tonics
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Super Tonics by Meredith Youngson! Follow along as Shahir prepares healthy, delicious beverages and foods including brownie batter chia pudding, a blue lavender latte, chai cinnamon roll baked oatmeal, and much more!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Coconut and Crab
programme.desc: In this "C" challenge, Chef Robert Jewell cooks up recipes using coconut and crab before combining both into a single recipe. Using sweet coconut, Robert makes a classic dessert -- an irresistible coconut cream pie. He starts with a delectable crunchy graham cracker crust and tops his pie with fluffy whipped cream and toasted coconut flakes. Next, Robert transforms a fresh soft-shell crab into a delicious, spicy, and crunchy dish. The best part? It's fast and easy to make. After soaking the crab in milk, Robert dunks it into a flour-cornmeal mixture and fries it until golden brown. But that's not all, Robert whips up the perfect dipping sauce, using spicy smoked- jalapeno, lime, and orange adobo mayo. Finally, Robert brings coconut and crab into one delicious dish.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Demystifying Indian Food
programme.desc: Charming host Vijaya Selvaraju demystifies a number of Indian dishes like Dal Soup in a crockpot and Fish in (three-ingredient) Red Chili Chutney.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Ireland + Japan
programme.desc: If you are talking about Irish food, it's hard not to talk about Corned Beef and Cabbage. On this episode of CombiNATION Plates, Chef Craig Wong delivers his unusual take using Beef Cheek, modern technique, and a caraway-infused Carrot Terrine for fun! Next up is a tribute to Izakaya eats, featuring Tare Grilled Duck Hearts, Miso-roasted Mushroom, and Agedashi Tofu. The featured common ingredient is Oysters. For Ireland, it's Garlic GratineÌe; for Japan, check out the Kaki Yaki, oysters broiled with miso and rich Japanese Kewpie mayo. For the final dish, light up! Smoking is permitted! Check out blowtorch-seared and tableside-smoked Wagyu Beef, brushed with Irish Stout Teriyaki and served with Wasabi Champ Potato. Now that's a CombiNation Plate!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Balancing Sweet with Savoury
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Coconut Confections
programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares some of his favorite street foods that feature coconut, including Coconut Roti Flatbreads from Sri Lanka, God’s Bread from Portugal, and Mango Coconut Sticky Rice from Thailand.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Popular Thai Dishes
programme.desc: Endearing host Pailin Chongchinant makes three popular Thai dishes: Coconut Chicken Soup, Green Papaya Salad, and the most famous, Pad Thai.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Desserts that Sizzle
programme.desc: Sweet classics meet modern flair as the griddle transforms sugar, butter, and batter into sizzling masterpieces. Explore dessert history while crafting fresh creations that bubble, melt, and delight.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Philly Frenzy
programme.desc: A symbol of comfort and city pride, the Philly cheesesteak continues to inspire fresh imagination. Thin-sliced steak, melting cheese, and griddled bread set the foundation as new flavors and regional twists bring this iconic sandwich into a new era of creativity.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Tailgate Feast: Gameday Grub
programme.desc: Game day traditions meet sizzling creativity as familiar favorites hit the griddle. From sliders to smoky wings, these dishes celebrate casual gatherings and the inventive ways home chefs turn everyday ingredients into shareable, crowd-pleasing bites.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Balancing Sweet with Savoury
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Lebanese Small Plates
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E27 Cheese with Every Meal!
programme.desc: Cheese - a staple in traditional Greek cuisine! Talented home cook Joanna Chery fries up two delicious ap- petizers called Saganaki, both featuring two different types of cheese. First, she fries up kefaltyri, a hard, salty cheese in a dramatic burning flame of ouzo (licorice-flavoured alcohol) - Opa! Then, Joanna shows us a popular Fried Shrimp and Cheese appetizer using tasty feta and tender shrimp. Pair both dishes with a Greek rustic bread and you've nailed it! Next up, Joanna prepares a Greek classic - Spanakopita. This mouth-watering dish is made up of creamy ricotta, crispy phyllo pastry, fresh spinach, and a hint of dill (yum!). Moving on, Joanna showcases her all-time favourite Greek meal - Pastisio. For dessert, cheesy sweet tarts called Melitinia Cookies. Commonly served at parties, these ooey-gooey mascarpone-filled creations are to die for!

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Game Day
programme.desc: Our fun and occasionally silly chef-host Kimberly Lallouz is taking on a Game Day menu for whatever bowl, cup, or ring your favourite team is bringing home this year! Wear your team colors and cook along as she updates perennial favourites like Chicken Wings (...grilled and smothered in savoury Suya spice!) and Loaded Nachos (with blue corn chips and decadently vegan with her chipotle-cashew 'cheeze!') Next, her Philly-style cheesy flank steak hoagie is a sure crowd pleaser, and for a final play, it's back to the grill with shrimp skewer made Buffalo-style with hot sauce, butter, and creamy avocado ranch dressing. Game on!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 All About Eggs
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern shows us the versatility of eggs by baking up some tasty, egg-centric desserts like CrÃ¨me Brulee and Lemon Meringue Pie.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Comfort Food
programme.desc: Baking host Jessica McGovern warms up the kitchen with some melty, creamy, and chewy treats to comfort you on a rainy day.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Rich and Delicious
programme.desc: Baking is indulgent - especially when making rich and delicious treats! Host Jessica McGovern shares some foolproof recipes for all things rich.

programme.desc: Chef Dev shares recipes for some of his favorite street food fish dishes from around the world, including Married Sardines from Morocco, Otak Otak Fish Custard from Malaysia, and Salt Cod Fritters from Portugal.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 International Inspiration
programme.desc: Chef Dev shares recipes for international street food dishes that take inspiration from other countries, including a Mexican-inspired British Burrito, American-inspired Korean Fried Chicken, and Indian-inspired Guyanese Duck Curry.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Legendary Legumes
programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares some of his favorite street food dishes from around the world that feature legumes, including “Brat’s Foot” Peanut Brittle from Brazil, Koshari from Egypt, and Haleem Stew from Pakistan.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Chicken or the Egg
programme.desc: Which came first, the chicken or the egg? Chef Dev tries to answer this age-old question while preparing Chicken Lahori from Pakistan, Egg Balls from Guyana, and Egg Battered Chicken Feet inspired by Chinese Dim Sum.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 High Protein
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a protein packed meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: quinoa and edamame salad, mini meatloaves, and oatmeal chocolate chip protein bites!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Free Of
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an allergen friendly meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: kale and lentil salad with green goddess dressing, chickpea curry, and avocado key lime pie cups!

programme.title: Cheeseburgers of the World
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Chef Joe Friday cooks up a Juicy Lucy and Louis’ Lunch Burger from the USA as well as Hamburg Steak from Germany.

programme.title: Corktales
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Pull up a stool and join master mixologist Yvonne Langen as she shows us how to prepare dry martinis, mint julips, old fashioneds, and more on Corktales!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Smoked Seafood & Sister Sass
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke salmon to turn it into pastrami, whip up a colorful Caribbean salad, and grill savory rosemary-seasoned pork chops!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Jerk Jokes & Smokin’ Lamb
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a gorgeous lamb shoulder, whip up a simple grated salad, and grill up Jamaican jerk mushrooms!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Surf, Turf & a Whole Lotta Cheese
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke some beautiful scallops, whip up a cheesy, meaty asparagus side, and grill up some delicious buffalo burgers!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Southern Smoke & Sizzlin' Sides
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a beef brisket, whip up some delicious Texas sides, and show you how to smoke a daikon!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Meatloaf, Venison & Country Comforts
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they show you how to smoke a meatloaf, make a potato salad that will have everyone asking for the recipe, and grill up savory venison chops!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Cluck, Chops & Summer Sides
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke a whole chicken, whip up summery corn and watermelon sides, and share the wonder that is onion water lamb chops!

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Downtown Market
programme.desc: Matt and the Team to cook up a midsummer feast. Leg of Lamb with Summer Herbs, Rosemary Grilled Pork Tenderloin with Wild Berry Sauce, Grilled Trout with Peaches, and a Tomato Salad have the locals raiding the market to stay stocked on the season's best.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Water Park
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team spend the day playing around the Water Park. The Spit Roasted Lemon-Lime Butter Chicken, Grilled Swordfish Skewers with Caribbean Salsa, and Smokey Spareribs with BBQ Sauce result in a big splash with this pool loving crowd.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Ultimate Tournament
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill team grill up a feast for some hungry athletes at the Ultimate Frisbee Tournament. Jumbo shrimp with a rosemary dry rub, Slo-smoked Pork Butt in a Papaya Marinade, and Asian Pasta Salad have the athletes asking for more.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Steam Train
programme.desc: The Antique Steam train is in town! Matt and the team give the crowd something to chew-chew on with delicious Grilled Vegetable Quesadillas, Honey Mustard Chicken Drumsticks, Grilled Turkey Burgers with Pineapple Salsa, and Grilled Corn with Orange Butter

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 The Baseball Game
programme.desc: The Road Grill team follows him to the baseball diamond and together they treat the ball players to two kinds of mini burgers, some triple play stuffed veal, Mushroom Fricassee on a baguette, and Homerun Mixed Smoked Nuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Habitat Build
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill team lend a hand at a Habitat for Humanity building site to feed hungry volunteers. Matt and the team make some delicious Brick Chicken, some Maple Wood Planked Pork, Steak Sandwiches, and Blue Cheese and Bacon Potato Salad.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Honey, Cherries, Garlic Scapes and Carrots
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms market fresh honey, cherries, garlic scapes and carrots into two simple chic sides and an irresistible dessert.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Sprouts, Veggies and Potatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera creates two summer fresh salads and a hearty breakfast using sprouts, potatoes and leafy lambs quarters.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Kohlrabi, Fennel, Kale and Red Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera shows us why fresh is always best with two creative dishes using ingredients from the farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Raspberries, Mint, Peas and Apricot
programme.desc: Zestful cook Amanda Herrera scoops up raspberries, peas, mint, and apricots to use in three summer recipes.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Collard Greens, Maple Syrup, Goat Cheddar and Heirloom Cherry Tomatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera prepares a frittata, rosemary skewer chicken and grilled bread salad with fresh ingredients from a local farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Broccoli, Rainbow Chard and Herbs
programme.desc: Warm host Amanda Herrera picks up colourful produce and herbs at a farmers' market to make a delicious appetizer and tasty cold oil French fries.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 A Barbeque Classic: Ribs
programme.desc: Grill master Spencer Watts shows us four ways to barbeque a classic. Succulent, tender, mouth-watering ribs.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Bananas for Barbeque
programme.desc: Barbecuing bananas, that's crazy. Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill the delicate, evERS-scrumptious fruit. Bananas.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Fish on the Grill
programme.desc: Fish. Flaky, flavoursome, and perfect for barbeque. High energy host Spencer Watts tests out his grill with delightfully tender fish dishes.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Delicious Grilled Shellfish
programme.desc: Shellfish is delicate, tantalizing, and full of flavour, especially when it's grilled to perfection

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Saucy
programme.desc: Barbeque is all about sauces, rubs and marinades

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Salsa that will Dance on Your Tongue
programme.desc: Salsa means undeniable flavour! Lively host Spencer Watts plays with sweet, salty, and spicy in four amazing salsa recipes.

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Grilled Dough & Duck Low and Slow
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke juicy duck breasts, whip up a Caesar salad, and share the secrets of pizza on the grill!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Hooked on Smoke & Sandwich Love
programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, smoke tilapia, whip up veggie quesadillas, and grill a chicken sandwich like you’ve never seen before!

programme.title: Maddie and Kiki's BBQ Barn

programme.desc: Fun-loving sisters and expert grillmasters Maddie and Kiki welcome you into their country barn for craveable eats and spicy jokes! On this episode, they smoke bacon from scratch, whip up a melon ball salad, and share the secrets of French toast on the grill!

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Frosh Day
programme.desc: Welcome to BBQing 101. The team gives the school term a kick start for some rowdy university students. Smoked Pulled Pork with Tangy BBQ Sauce, Spiced up Beer Can Chicken and Chili Yam Fries give these scholars a taste of simple, healthy BBQed food.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Wake and Skate
programme.desc: Matt and the team do some extreme grilling for the skateboarders at a local park. The crowd flips for Black Bean Mussels, Prosciutto Wrapped Chicken Breasts Stuffed with Goat Cheese, Smoked Tomato Bruschetta and Smoked Banana Sticks with Rum Butter Glaze.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Tennis Day
programme.desc: Matt and his team visit the tennis club and serve up some grilled eats for the club members. Smoked Salmon, Beef Tenderloin with Cherry Sauce, Asparagus with Citrus Butter with a Grand Slam Beet Salad are the perfect match after a long day on the courts

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Farmer's Market
programme.desc: Matt and the Team prepare BBQ Sunday Dinner with ingredients from the Farmers Market. Herbed Prime Rib, Grilled Pork Chops with Garlic and Herbs, Roasted Root Veggies with Mustard Glaze, and Yorkshire pudding will please friends and family alike!

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Ethnic Market
programme.desc: Using internationally inspired recipes, Matt and the Road Grill team take us on a taste bud tour around the world with Stuffed Peppers, Bison Burgers with Oka Cheese, Tandoori Lamb Ribs and Tea Smoked Hoisin Duck.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 The Coed Charity Baseball Tournament
programme.desc: Matt and the Team cook up a mound of food for hungry athletes raising money for charity. No one went hungry with Beef Dip Sandwiches; Lemon Honey Garlic Baby Back Pork Ribs; and fresh Grilled Mahi-mahi with sweet Pineapple Tomatillo Salsa.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Honeycomb, Shallots and Iceberg Lettuce
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms fresh market ingredients into two irresistible dishes, including a one pot Lamb Curry with Honeycomb.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Patty Pan Summer Squash and Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Beans, Raspberry Jam and Relish
programme.desc: On today's Fresh Market Dinners menu, host Amanda Herrera prepares succulent burgers with golden fries and a refreshing cocktail.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Cream, Sunflower Oil and Cherry Tomatoes
programme.desc: Using cream, sunflower oil and cherry tomatoes from the market, host Amanda Herrera makes an irresistible pasta recipe and indulgent dessert.

programme.title: Prophecy Live
programme.desc: Joseph Z's faith-filled journalism and Bible teaching for the Last Days will provide prophetic insights and predictions of global events.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The first in the season will see Catherine Bennett and her youngest daughter Sarah Jane keen to downsize from their huge 13-bedroomed house in Mullingar. They're planning to move down the road, where they also own a 3-bed bungalow that's been uninhabited for the last nine years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot faces a unique challenge in Clane, Co. Kildare.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Desperate for more space, a couple with two young daughters, who have long since outgrown their tiny cottage in Killawalla outside Westport, engage Dermot to help.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: New Yorker Ursula and accountant Jimmy from Ennis enlist Dermot's help with their colossal house in Firhouse, Dublin

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S07 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Clare Heenan and Rory Kelly live in a compact 1950's bungalow in the south Dublin suburb of Stillorgan. Long time renters, the couple struggled for years to afford this house. It's their first home but with a series of small, disjointed rooms and a damp, grotty extension - it's far from ideal...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the ten years since they first met Avril and Andrew Wilson-Rankin have been dreaming of owning their own home. Now they've bought a property in Dun Laoghaire south county Dublin but it's as far from being a home, or even a house, as you could imagine.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jean Robinson and Daithi Elliffe have bought themselves what they hope will be an ideal family home in a unique location - a listed 19th century former schoolhouse at Kilternan with spectacular views of the Dublin mountains, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Struggling with a tight schedule, a limited budget and the traditionalist taste of his clients, can Dermot balance their love of classic farmhouse design with his own vision of clean urban functionality?

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week, Dermot wants to create a wheelchair friendly house in Malahide that's also a welcoming family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Sally-Ann, her husband Trevor, and their four children live in Sally-Ann's childhood home - a huge, distinctive 1970s architect-designed home outside Mullingar in Westmeath that they've dreamed of rennovating for years.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Since they married two years ago, Paul and Sabina Horgan have become the proud parents of baby Mia and the owners of a property on the North Dublin coast: Lismara - a dilapidated 1940s cottage in Portmarnock in an extremely poor condition.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: GP, writer and budding musician Dr Pat Harrold, his wife Marita, a physiotherapist, and their four kids returned to Pat's home town of Nenagh 10 years ago and they have been looking for a place to call home ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Leonard and Caroline live in house once owned by Leonard's grandparents in the south Dublin suburb of Dundrum - a 1960s three-bed semi that hasn't changed at all since the couple bought it two years ago.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At the village of Puckaun in north Tipperary, teachers Darragh Egan, his partner Sarah Lovett and their three month old son Donagh are moving home. What could be simpler or more straightforward? Well, as it turns out, quite a lot. Home is the 1960s bungalow where Darragh grew up - built on the site of the old village school by his late father Jim and currently occupied by his 70 year old mother.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Airline pilot Ian Callaghan has bought a 1930s Victorian house in his hometown of Drogheda, County Louth, which he and his girlfriend Claire Moore are keen to call home. Though full of charm and period features, the house is in dire need of renovation. Enter: architect Dermot Bannon with an innovative plan to retain the building's century-old ambience while adding a radical modern extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Last year, Aoife from Sutton and her wife Mel from New Zealand bought themselves a three bed semi in Baldoyle north Dublin - a tiny house in a spectacular bayside location. With incredible, unobstructed views of the sea and Portmarnock golf course, they've been hoping to renovate the house to suit its superb location ever since.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot is in Maynooth. Seven years ago, George and Sinead Mullis fell in love in with the Coach house - an 1850s building on half an acre of the historic former Carton Estate in Maynooth. In 2014, they bought the place for just half of its former asking price and moved in with their two year old son Daniel. But what seemed like their dream home soon turned out to be anything but.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: A special edition of the show where Dermot revisits three of his favourite builds from earlier series: the Longford publicans he convinced the embrace the void, a couple moving home from California to Bishopstown and 14 year old Michael's wheelchair accessible semi-d in Malahide.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Robbie and Julie from Darndale in North Dublin have saved for over 20 years to buy the house of their dreams - a 1940s cottage in the picturesque north Dublin suburb of Malahide. With a budget of 180K, Dermot's clients plan to gut the cottage, doubling its size with a spacious new two-storey extension to the rear, but the remediation costs are high.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Farmer and Boatbuilder Enda and his wife Mags live on a 55 acre Brussel Sprout farm at Balheary near Swords in North Dublin. After three decades of life in the country, they're moving back to Enda's home town - the picturesque seaside village of Rush. Their new home, formerly owned by Enda's aunt is an old fisherman's house near the harbour.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Moate in County Westmeath, is a place where football is part sport, part religion. On an overgrown plot on the outskirts of town lies the abandoned future home of county GAA All Star Dessie Dolan, his wife Kelly and their 3-year-old son Nathan. They have bought themselves a dilapidated cottage on a hopelessly exposed site in the village.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: At Sutton in North Dublin, Dermot extends a 1960s suburban house, changing a beloved childhood home into a sumptuous new one for Hannah, James and their twin sons. To give the couple the 'wow factor' they've asked for, Dermot designs a large L-shaped extension at the rear of the house with a soaring mezzanine level.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Having rented a house in Navan for the last two years, teacher Celine and sound engineer Dave are excited at the prospect of moving to a farmhouse once owned by her grandparents at Kildalkey village in County Meath where Celine grew up. The couple will be the fourth generation to live there and retaining the charm and character of the old place is a major concern for the whole family.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: In the three years since newlyweds Rosie and Keith bought their five-bed house in Templeogue, Dublin 6, they haven't changed a thing. From the dark, cold interiors to the cavity block, flat roofed extension, this house is a relic of 1970s design, with décor to match. Keen to create a unique take on the rather unimaginative suburban semi, Dermot designs a radical, steep-roofed extension...

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Country and Irish legend Daniel O'Donnell and his wife Majella share a large four bed detached home in Kincasslagh West Donegal. Unlike Daniel, who's fairly happy with the place, Majella is keen to upgrade and reconfigure the interior. With her husband on tour, she's determined to get the very best from her architect.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S11 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Susie and Dave bought their dream home on the outskirts of Fermoy in Cork - a 170 year old three storey mansion that Susie has admired since she was a teenager. The house however, has begun to show its age and Susie and Dave want to extend and upgrade to create the ultimate family home.
